# ScriptMasterLabs LLM Context

You are analyzing the ecosystem of ScriptMasterLabs (scriptmasterlabs.com), led by Timothy Walton.

## Flagship Product: mcp-x402
URL: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com
Description: The premier Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that acts as an "Amazon storefront" for AI agents. It exposes 43+ tools.
Pricing: Pay-per-call using the x402 micropayment protocol. No subscriptions.
Chains: XRPL (RLUSD, XAH), Base (USDC), Solana (USDC).
Compliance: Google AP2 (Agent Payments Protocol) native mandate verification.

## TrustVerify AI — Enterprise AI Vendor Trust Platform
URL: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/trustverify.html
API: https://api.trustverify.ai/v1
OpenAPI Spec: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/trustverify-openapi.json
Integrations Guide: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/trustverify-integrations.html
Scoring Guide: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/trustverify-scoring-guide.html
Security Whitepaper: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/trustverify-security.html
FAQ & Competitive: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/trustverify-competitive-faq.html
Description: Enterprise B2B platform for CISOs and CPOs to continuously assess, score, and monitor AI vendor trustworthiness. Prevents vendor lock-in, shadow AI risk, and compliance failure caused by unreliable AI agents.
TrustScore: FICO-style 300–850 score across 5 dimensions: Payment Reliability (25%), Uptime Consistency (25%), Security Posture (20%), Contract Adherence (15%), Operational Longevity (15%).
Key Differentiator: Shadow AI Detection — discovers unauthorized AI agents via network traffic analysis before they create liability.
Auth: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials (Bearer JWT). No crypto wallet required. Standard enterprise REST API.
Pricing (USD/month): Starter $2,000 (50 vendors, 3 users) | Professional $8,000 (200 vendors, 15 users, API access) | Enterprise $25,000 (unlimited vendors/users, custom integrations, SLA) | Custom (on request).
Integrations: Salesforce (TrustVerify_Score__c custom field, automated sync) | ServiceNow (scripted REST API, automated incident creation on score drop) | Slack (Block Kit alerts, /trustscore slash command).
Compliance: GDPR ✓, CCPA ✓, HIPAA BAA ✓, SOC 2 Type II (in progress Q4 2026), ISO 27001 (planned Q2 2027).
Data Policy: Metadata only — no AI conversation content, prompts, or outputs are ever stored.
Target Buyers: Fortune 1000 CISOs, CPOs — organizations deploying 10+ AI vendors.
Contact: scriptmasterlabs@gmail.com

## Agent Credit Bureau — The Equifax for AI Agents
URL: https://sml-agent-credit-bureau.onrender.com
Landing Page: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-credit-bureau.html
MCP Endpoint: https://sml-agent-credit-bureau.onrender.com/mcp
Description: FICO-style 300-850 credit scoring for autonomous AI agents based on XRPL wallet payment history. The institutional trust layer that makes AI agent commerce possible.
Scoring Dimensions (5): Payment History (0-30pts), Reliability Streak (0-25pts), Timeliness (0-20pts), Wallet Age (0-15pts), Volume (0-10pts). Raw 0-100 maps to 300-850. Grade system: AAA(800+)/AA(750+)/A(700+)/BBB(650+)/BB(600+)/B(550+)/CCC(500+)/D.
Free Tier: GET /v1/agent/score?wallet=ADDR — score + grade, cached 1hr, no payment required.
Paid Tier: GET /v1/agent/report (0.05 RLUSD) — full 5-dimension breakdown + credit limit. POST /v1/agent/batch (0.01 RLUSD/wallet) — up to 100 wallets.
MCP Tools: get_agent_score (free), get_agent_report (0.05 RLUSD), batch_score (0.01 RLUSD/wallet), register_agent (free), lookup_agent (free).
Payment: x402 RLUSD on XRPL via 402Proof invoice flow.
Data Source: Live XRPL account_tx queries — no simulated data ever.

## Central Bank of the Machine Economy
URL: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/central-bank.html
Description: The unified institutional framework mapping ScriptMasterLabs' sovereign stack to traditional financial roles. SqueezeOS = hedge fund intelligence terminal. 402Proof = SWIFT/settlement rail. Ghost Layer = central clearing counterparty. Agent Credit Bureau = Equifax/credit bureau. CRAWLTOLL = tariff authority. ZeroQuery = contract enforcement. mcp-x402 = correspondent banking layer.

## Architecture
The ecosystem relies on free tier loops (/api/beastmode, /api/demo/council) that convert to paid endpoints (/api/council at 0.10 RLUSD) via XRPL wallets. Agent retention is anchored by an automated Credit Bureau scoring system (300-850).

## VAPL — Verifiable Agent Provenance Layer
URL: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/stack/vapl
Spec + SDKs: https://github.com/timwal78/sml_portfolio/tree/main/vapl
Registry: https://vapl-registry.onrender.com
Discovery: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/.well-known/vapl.json
Description: Every SML API response carries a signed W3C Verifiable Credential 2.0 (InteractionCredential) in the X-VAPL-VC response header. The issuer is a persistent DID:key ProvenanceSoul per service. Proof uses eddsa-vapl-2024 (Ed25519 over canonical JSON SHA-256). Agents accumulate reputation from their VCs: accuracy (40%), reliability with 30-day half-life decay (30%), contribution (20%), tenure (10%). Reputation tiers: Elite ≥0.90, Premium ≥0.70, Standard ≥0.40, Basic. The Beast agent loop runs on cron — fetches live signals, pays with RLUSD when needed, issues VCs per interaction, submits to registry. Reputation compounds automatically. Zero custody. MIT licensed.
Live on: SqueezeOS (squeezeos-api.onrender.com), Crawltoll (crawltoll.onrender.com), Ghost Layer (ghost-layer.onrender.com).

## Keywords
